fixture_mutation_summary: Use the checked-in fixture/config named by this manifest entry without additional human interpretation.
expected_score_rule: If status is succeeded, issue penalties and bands MUST be computed from the registry score_effect and deterministic scoring contract.
required_assertions: CLI preflights output paths before writing any file
stdout is empty when --output was requested
no partial output or quality sidecar is created or modified
diagnostics contain output_channel_write_failed when a JSON result can be emitted
file-system state matches expected_files_created and expected_files_absent_or_unmodified

preconditions: make <unsafe-path> a directory, symlink, missing-parent path, or permission-denied target according to the concrete test variant
ensure output files do not exist before execution
